Attacks.Name: Tackle
Attacks.Effect: After this attack is resolved, this character gains power equal to the damage dealt.

Attacks.Name: Water Gun
Attacks.Effect: After this attack is resolved, this character gains power equal to the damage dealt. If a wild is rolled, the target character is pushed away S distance from Shellder.

Attacks.Name: Ice Shard
Attacks.Effect: After this attack is resolved, this character gains power equal to the damage dealt. If a wild is rolled, the target character gains the Slow special condition.

Superpowers.Name: Shell Armor
Superpowers.Effect: Critical hits against this character are treated as normal hits.

Superpowers.Name: Withdraw
Superpowers.Effect: Add 2 dice to Shellder's defense rolls until the start of its next activation.

Attacks.Name: Clamp
Attacks.Effect: If a wild is rolled during this attack, the target character gains the Rooted special condition until the end of their next activation.

Superpowers.Name: Iron Defense
Superpowers.Effect: Until the start of Shellder's next activation, add 1 die to its defense rolls. This effect stacks with Withdraw.

Superpowers.Name: Evolution
Superpowers.Effect: Replace this character with a Cloyster character of the same injured status. The new character begins with damage equal to the damage on this character and power equal to the power on this character.
